CREATE TABLE DB.DBA.example_table (id INT, name VARCHAR(255));
CREATE PROCEDURE DB.DBA.str_concat (in a VARCHAR, in b VARCHAR) { return concat(a, ':', b); };
SELECT virt:concat_strings(name, ' - Suffix') AS modified_name FROM DB.DBA.example_table;
SELECT * FROM DB.DBA.example_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM DB.DBA.example_table WHERE name LIKE 'Example%');
SELECT id, virt:concat_strings(name, ' - New') AS updated_name FROM DB.DBA.example_table WHERE id > 0;
SELECT DISTINCT virt:concat_strings(a.name, b.name) FROM DB.DBA.example_table a JOIN DB.DBA.example_table b ON a.id != b.id;
SELECT p FROM ws..sys_dav_res WHERE xpath_contains(RES_CONTENT, '[xmlns:virt=''http://example.com/virtuoso/xslt''] virt:concat_strings(''Title '', string(/chapter/title))', p);
CREATE PROCEDURE DB.DBA.str_concat_extended (in a VARCHAR, in b VARCHAR, in c VARCHAR) { return concat(a, ':', b, ':', c); };
SELECT virt:concat_strings_extended(name, 'Some', 'Extra') AS extended_name FROM DB.DBA.example_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT virt:concat_strings(name, virt:concat_strings('Prepended', ' - Suffix')) AS modified_name FROM DB.DBA.example_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT virt:concat_strings(name, ' - Inner') AS inner_concat FROM DB.DBA.example_table) AS inner_query WHERE inner_concat LIKE '%Inner%';
CREATE PROCEDURE DB.DBA.str_concat_multi (in a VARCHAR, in b VARCHAR, in c VARCHAR, in d VARCHAR) { return concat(a, ':', b, ':', c, ':', d); };
SELECT virt:concat_strings_multi(name, 'A', 'B', 'C') AS multi_concat FROM DB.DBA.example_table WHERE id < 3;
